name: wirenet-manager
description: Bootstrap and run local work memory with Project Packs, bounded experiments, and explicit persistent goals.

interface.shortDescription: Local work memory and Project Pack routing
interface.longDescription: Bootstrap a content-only local Manager, maintain Manager-native or externally bound Project Packs, run bounded Experiment Packs, and explicitly activate persistent UltraGoals without implicit triggering.
defaultPrompt: Use $wirenet-manager to show my current stack.
Use $wirenet-manager to open my Manager viewer.
Use $wirenet-manager-bootstrap to check and upgrade my existing Manager.
Use $ultragoal to explicitly activate a persistent goal.
